title: Faster Paths
description: This Mod/Datapack gives you speed 2 on path blocks
body:
# Faster Paths
Faster Paths allows you to walk faster on path blocks and lets you walk up path blocks without jumping like stairs with a fully customizable config with the help of [Datapack Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/datapack-commands) (A semi required dependency)


<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

## Speed

```
/fasterpaths speed slow/medium/fast
```


changes the total speed from speed 1/2/3 (default is medium)

## Step

```
/fasterpaths step on/off
```


turns on or off paths having a stairlike ability (default is on)

# Hidden Path
```
/fasterpaths hidden_path on/off
```

turns on or off the hidden path functionality (default is on)

</details>




If you have any problems or would like a feature please tell me in [the Discord Server](https://discord.gg/ZRTzwxD7WD)
